target: 3. Ushio's Proposal
...Ah, what a nostalgic scenery. It hasn't changed at all~.
Did you use to play around here a lot in the past?
No, I wasn't really the type to play outside much...
But I remember that when it rained, a puddle would form around there, and there would be lots of water striders.
Come to think of it, when you're in Tokyo, you don't get the chance to see water striders as much as here, huh.
Oh, really?
People who come to this island from the city might ultimately be attracted to that kind of natural scenery.
I see. But even if we're PRing the island's natural scenery, doesn't it have to be something unique to this island?
That's the difficult part, huh.
Yeah, it is...
Then, let's try making school the topic. You went to elementary and middle school here, right?
Yeah, um... I was a library committee member...
Yeah, yeah.
Every single day, I just read books in the library...
Ummm... is that the end?
Ah, besides that... it was a small school building, and there were very few students. That's about it, I guess?
...Um, anything else?
Anything else... hmmm, was there anything?
Ah, I know! The summer festival the day after tomorrow!
You enjoyed the festival when you were a kid too, didn't you, Kaori-chan?
Yeah, I went many times! It was so much fun~!
I went with my family, ate takoyaki, played goldfish scooping... The Umi-okuri was beautiful too.
Yeah, yeah, and then?
But... that might be about it.
I-Is that so...
I'm sorry... It's just kind of normal, or rather, plain and common things.
Ahaha... You don't need to apologize to us.
Anyway, let's walk around the island a bit more. If we do, there might be more things you can remember.
Found you!
Huh? Oh, Ushio!
So this is where you were, Shinpei!
Sis? Why are you in a place like this?
What do you mean why!
I was waiting at Kofune the whole time, but you didn't come back at all, so I was looking all over for you!
What were you doing with Mio!? I kept calling but you wouldn't answer at all!
Huh? ...Ah, you're right. I didn't notice.
Ah, me too. I left it on silent mode from when we were at the town hall.
The town hall? Why did you need to go to the town hall?
Ah, um…
Huh…?
Huh? Um... Could it be, Kaori-chan!?
E-Eeeh? W-Wa-wa, you remember me...!?
Yeah, I remember you. It really is Kaori-chan! It's been so long!
You're Ushio Kofune-san, right? I'm so happy... you remembered me.
Of course I'd remember. There weren't many kids in our elementary school class, so it'd be weirder if I forgot.
That's what she says, Shin-chan.
You didn't remember her at all, did you.
Ugh…
But, what's going on? It's been a really long time since you came back to the island, Kaori-chan.

Y-yeah…
Um…
Ooh, I see. So that's what happened.
I get it! Then leave it to me!
If you don't have any memories, we can just make them together from now on!
Kofune-san...
But, what are we gonna do to make memories? There's not much time until the festival.
Well, that's something we'll figure out from here on out!
You're all momentum as usual, huh...
Shut up!
Hehe... You haven't changed, Kofune-san. Just like you were in the past.
Right~... wait, huh? That's a compliment, right?
Yeah, of course.
Ahaha, I see! Thanks, Kaori-chan.
...Ah, that's right!
What is it?
I just remembered something good! The <color=#GF_TIPS_095>time capsule</color>!
Time capsule?
You know, when everyone at school packed various things and buried it? The one we did when Kaori-chan was moving away.
That did happen, didn't it... Come to think of it, was that when Koyuba-san was moving away?
Y-yeah…
Right, right. Us lowerclassmen were made to go along with it too.
But a time capsule buried with your island friends, isn't that perfect for a story to tell at the talk show!?
We can make the time capsule the main topic, and you can talk about your casual everyday memories and the scenery of the island along with it.
It'll leave an impression on the audience, and it'll be good PR for the island too!
True, if we have one big episode, the talk show will probably be more exciting.
There's no time like the present! Let's go dig it up right away!
U-Um, wait a second...!
What's wrong?
Um, w-well, for something like that... Shouldn't we dig it up when we're a bit older...?
Kaori-chan is right. Normally, you're supposed to open time capsules after a few decades have passed.
Yeah. It's been 7 years since we buried it... It might still be too early.
It's fine. Compared to back then, we're basically adults now.
W-Well, we're not quite there yet...
Jeez! This is why you're such a pain, Sis. You're way too pushy.
I mean... in the end, it's just that you want to see what's inside, right Ushio?
Is that so bad?
No, not really...
Alright, it's decided then! Let's go.
Wait, Sis!
Ugh... Wh-What should I do?
